technicalSEO.title: Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame - Plastic Sidewalk Sign
technicalSEO.metaDescription: The Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame is perfect for outdoor advertisements. Available with a white or black frame. Design your own custom sidewalk sign with ease!

seoRecommendations: {"ts":"2026-03-04T22:11:25.712Z","level":"info","event":"metric","agent":"pdpAgent","url":"https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/signicade-deluxe-a-frame-black","model":"claude-sonnet-4-20250514","tokensIn":3456,"tokensOut":2991,"promptVersion":"unknown","templateVersion":"unknown","durationMs":58802} ## 1) BEFORE HEADING STRUCTURE - H1: Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Sidewalk Sign - H2: Complete Kit - H2: More About Signicade Deluxe A-Frames Return to Top - H2: Why Choose Banners.com? - H2: Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top - H3: What is an A-frame sign (sidewalk sign)? - H3: Are these A-frames suitable for outdoor use year-round? - H3: Does the Signicade Deluxe A-frame include one or two printed signs? - H3: Do you offer more than one color of Signicade Deluxe A-frame? - H3: Do you offer other A-frame sizes or styles? - H2: Why Choose Banners.com? (duplicate) - H4: Search ## 2) AFTER OPTIMIZED STRUCTURE - H1: Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Sidewalk Sign - H2: Black Signicade Deluxe Complete Kit Features - H2: Black Signicade Deluxe Construction & Materials - H2: Black Signicade Deluxe Installation & Durability - H2: Black Signicade Deluxe Pricing & Customization Options - H2: Frequently Asked Questions - H3: What is an A-frame sign (sidewalk sign)? - H3: Are these A-frames suitable for outdoor use year-round? - H3: Does the Signicade Deluxe A-frame include one or two printed signs? - H3: Do you offer more than one color of Signicade Deluxe A-frame? - H3: Do you offer other A-frame sizes or styles? ## 3) PRODUCT HEADER The Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame delivers professional outdoor advertising with water-resistant durability and maintenance-free operation. This complete sidewalk sign kit includes a sturdy black plastic frame with molded handles for easy transport, plus two full-color 24" x 36" printed signs. The frame can be filled with water or sand for enhanced stability, making it perfect for storefronts, restaurants, and high-traffic advertising locations. ## 4) CONFIGURATOR LABELS Complete Kit, Replacement Signs, Replacement Hardware ## 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB The Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame combines professional appearance with practical outdoor advertising functionality. This foldable sidewalk sign features a durable black plastic frame that won't rust or splinter, designed for year-round outdoor use. Each complete kit includes two 24" x 36" full-color printed signs, allowing double-sided advertising with maximum visibility. The frame's innovative design includes molded carrying handles for effortless transport between indoor storage and outdoor display. Fill the base with water or sand to increase stability in windy conditions. The compact folding mechanism saves valuable storage space while maintaining the sign's structural integrity. Digital printing on 4mm corrugated plastic material ensures vibrant, weather-resistant graphics that maintain their appearance through extensive outdoor exposure. The lightweight yet durable construction makes this sign ideal for restaurants displaying daily specials, retail stores promoting sales, churches announcing service times, and businesses advertising grand openings. Each sign can be customized with different messages, creating versatile marketing opportunities for welcoming customers and promoting your business effectively. ## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB The Black Signicade Deluxe utilizes premium 4mm corrugated plastic material for both durability and visual impact. This lightweight, waterproof substrate features hollow flutes similar to cardboard construction, providing excellent rigidity while remaining easy to handle and transport. The corrugated plastic material offers superior weather resistance compared to traditional cardboard signs, maintaining structural integrity through rain, snow, and UV exposure. Digital printing technology ensures vibrant color reproduction and sharp text clarity that remains fade-resistant over time. The black plastic frame construction eliminates concerns about rust, rot, or splintering common with metal or wooden alternatives. This maintenance-free material choice reduces long-term replacement costs while ensuring consistent professional appearance. The frame's molded plastic design includes integrated handles and a secure folding mechanism that withstands repeated setup and storage cycles. Both the printed signs and frame materials are designed for commercial-grade outdoor use, providing reliable performance in high-traffic environments where consistent brand presentation is essential for business success. ## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB Black Signicade Deluxe signs feature full-color digital printing that delivers vibrant, professional-quality graphics with sharp text and detailed imagery. The printing process penetrates the corrugated plastic surface, creating weather-resistant graphics that maintain their appearance through extended outdoor exposure. The standard finish provides a slight matte appearance that reduces glare while ensuring excellent readability in various lighting conditions. This finishing approach works well for both photographic images and text-heavy designs, maintaining consistent quality across different graphic elements. Each 24" x 36" sign can be customized with unique designs, allowing businesses to display different messages on each side of the frame. Common finishing options include welcome messages, menu displays, promotional announcements, and directional information. The printing process accommodates full-bleed designs that extend to the sign edges, creating maximum visual impact. Color matching ensures brand consistency across multiple signs, while the weather-resistant finishing protects your investment through seasons of outdoor display. ## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB Black Signicade Deluxe production begins immediately upon artwork approval and typically requires 3-5 business days for complete kit assembly. Rush production options are available for urgent advertising needs, with expedited processing reducing turnaround to 1-2 business days. Digital printing and frame assembly occur in our facility to ensure quality control throughout the production process. Each sign undergoes inspection before packaging to verify print quality and proper frame assembly. Production time may vary based on design complexity and current order volume. Custom sizing requests or special finishing options may require additional processing time. Our customer service team provides real-time production updates through our live order tracking system. Standard production includes weekdays only, with orders submitted after business hours beginning production the following business day. Weekend and holiday periods may extend production schedules, which our team will communicate during the ordering process. ## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB Banners.com accepts all major credit cards including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover for Black Signicade Deluxe orders. Secure payment processing ensures your financial information remains protected throughout the transaction. Corporate accounts can utilize purchase orders and net terms for qualifying businesses. Our accounting department works with established customers to arrange convenient payment schedules for larger orders or recurring sign needs. PayPal integration provides additional payment flexibility for customers preferring alternative payment methods. All payment options include the same product warranties and customer service support regardless of payment method selected. For bulk orders or institutional purchases, contact our customer service team to discuss volume pricing and extended payment terms. We work with schools, churches, and businesses to accommodate budget requirements while maintaining our quality standards and delivery commitments. ## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB Black Signicade Deluxe signs ship via UPS Ground or FedEx Ground depending on destination and size requirements. Complete kits are carefully packaged to prevent damage during transit, with frames and printed signs secured separately within the shipping container. Standard shipping typically delivers within 3-7 business days after production completion. Expedited shipping options including overnight and 2-day delivery are available for urgent installations. Shipping costs are calculated based on package weight, dimensions, and destination zip code. Large quantity orders may qualify for freight shipping, which can reduce per-unit shipping costs while ensuring safe delivery of multiple signs. Our shipping department coordinates delivery schedules for commercial installations requiring specific timing. Tracking information is provided automatically upon shipment, allowing you to monitor delivery progress and prepare for sign installation. Delivery signature may be required for high-value orders to ensure secure receipt of your advertising investment. ## 11) COMMON USES TAB Black Signicade Deluxe signs excel in high-traffic retail environments where professional appearance attracts customer attention. Restaurants frequently use these signs for daily specials, happy hour promotions, and outdoor seating advertisements that drive foot traffic and increase sales. Retail stores utilize the dual-sided design for seasonal promotions, clearance sales, and new product announcements. The professional black frame complements upscale storefronts while maintaining weather resistance for year-round outdoor display. Churches and community organizations rely on these signs for event announcements, service times, and special programs. The easy transport design allows volunteers to quickly set up promotional displays for fundraisers, festivals, and community gatherings. Real estate professionals appreciate the professional appearance for open house announcements and property marketing. Construction companies use these signs for safety notifications and project information. The versatile design accommodates various industries requiring durable, portable advertising solutions that maintain professional standards while withstanding outdoor conditions and frequent repositioning. ## 12) ARTWORK TAB Black Signicade Deluxe artwork should be designed at 24" x 36" dimensions with 300 DPI resolution for optimal print quality. Submit files in PDF, JPG, or PNG format with fonts embedded or converted to outlines to ensure accurate reproduction. Allow 0.25" bleed on all edges for full-coverage designs, keeping important text and logos at least 0.5" from edges to prevent trimming. Our design team can assist with artwork creation or modifications to ensure your signs achieve maximum visual impact. Color profiles should use CMYK for accurate color matching, though RGB files are acceptable and will be converted during production. High-contrast designs with bold text ensure readability from typical viewing distances in outdoor environments. Our online design tool allows real-time customization with template options for common business uses. Professional design services are available for complex layouts or brand-specific requirements. Artwork approval is required before production begins to ensure your satisfaction with the final product. ## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT The Black Signicade Deluxe represents the ideal balance of professional appearance, weather durability, and practical functionality for outdoor business advertising. Its robust construction and premium materials justify the investment through years of reliable service and consistent brand presentation. Beyond the standard black frame option, consider exploring our complete selection of a frames and banner stands to find the perfect advertising solution for your specific needs. The signicade deluxe a frame white offers an alternative aesthetic for different business environments. Installation requires no tools or special skills, making it accessible for any team member to deploy effective advertising displays. The combination of portability, durability, and professional appearance makes this sign an essential tool for businesses serious about attracting customers and increasing visibility in competitive markets. ## 14) FAQ **What is an A-frame sign (sidewalk sign)?** An A-frame sign, also called a sidewalk sign or sandwich board, is a foldable, freestanding advertising display used in high foot-traffic areas like storefronts, strip malls, restaurants, and parking lots. The Black Signicade Deluxe features a durable plastic frame holding two 24" x 36" printed signs for maximum visibility and professional presentation. **Are these A-frames suitable for outdoor use year-round?** Yes, the Black Signicade Deluxe is specifically designed for year-round outdoor use. The frame is constructed from durable plastic that won't rust or splinter, and can be filled with sand or water for enhanced stability in windy conditions. The printed signs use weather-resistant materials that maintain their appearance through seasonal exposure. **Does the Signicade Deluxe A-frame include one or two printed signs?** Each complete kit includes two full-color printed signs sized 24" × 36" (one for each side of the frame). This allows you to display different messages or duplicate your advertising for maximum impact, doubling your marketing potential while maintaining a compact footprint. **Do you offer more than one color of Signicade Deluxe A-frame?** Yes, Signicade Deluxe A-frames are available in both black and white frame options. The black frame provides a professional, sleek appearance that complements most business environments, while the white option offers a different aesthetic for specific branding needs. **What file formats do you accept for artwork submission?** We accept PDF, JPG, and PNG file formats for Black Signicade Deluxe artwork. Files should be designed at 24" x 36" dimensions with 300 DPI resolution. Include 0.25" bleed for full-coverage designs and keep important elements at least 0.5" from edges. Our design team can assist with file preparation if needed. **How long does production take for the Black Signicade Deluxe?** Standard production time is 3-5 business days after artwork approval. Rush production options are available, reducing turnaround to 1-2 business days for urgent needs. Production begins immediately upon artwork approval, and we provide real-time tracking updates throughout the process.
